calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Against Respondent Synchronicity.Co, Inc
Off Calendar Jan-08-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER JEFF WEBER's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Against Respondent Synchronicity.Co, Inc.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Jeff Weber's unopposed petition "to confirm arbitration award against respondent Synchronicity Co., Inc." is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Christine L. Jordan, CSR No. 12262, cjordan@sftc.org (302/RBU)
